description: Reader reads RM sticks, compute tilizes then untilizes (identity passthrough), writer writes RM sticks

change: Fixed TensorAccessorArgs placeholder from [0] to [0,0] for absent gamma/beta
reason: TensorAccessorArgs uses 2 CT args for interleaved tensors; single 0 would cause CT arg index out of bounds in kernel

approach: TensorAccessor for RM sticks, push Wt pages per tile-row block of 32 sticks, generate reduce scaler and epsilon tiles, optional gamma/beta reads with zero-padding
tilize c_0->c_1, then untilize c_1->c_16 (identity passthrough). Uses tilize and untilize helpers with default InitAndUninit mode.
Wait for Wt pages in cb_out_rm, extract 32 RM sticks per tile-row, write to DRAM via TensorAccessor with noc_async_write
Fixed reduce scaler from SUM to AVG pool type so scaler = 1/W for mean computation

upstream_fixes: Fixed TensorAccessorArgs placeholder from [0] to [0,0] for absent gamma/beta
design_deviations: Skipped copy to c_31 intermediate - untilize directly from c_1 for identity passthrough

description: Add REDUCE_ROW for mean computation, output is mean broadcast to full input shape

approach: tilize c_0->c_1, reduce_row c_1->c_24 (mean), unary_bcast COL to broadcast mean Wt times into c_29, untilize c_29->c_16

cb_summary: c0:Wt/Wt c1:Wt/Wt(reduce) c8:1/persist c24:1/1 c29:Wt/Wt c16:Wt/Wt

design_deviations: Used unary_bcast COL instead of binary_op for mean broadcast - simpler and avoids needing a zeros CB

description: Add sub(input, mean) with COL broadcast. Output is centered values (input - row_mean).

approach: tilize c_0->c_1, reduce_row c_1->c_24 (WaitUpfrontNoPop), sub COL(c_1,c_24)->c_25 (NoWaitNoPop on A), manual pop c_1, untilize c_25->c_16

cb_summary: c0:Wt/Wt c1:Wt/wait_upfront+manual_pop c8:1/persist c24:1/1 c25:Wt/Wt c16:Wt/Wt
